summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Admin Panel UI/UX improvements including compilation fixes, shared ISO_CURRENCIES constant, SearchableSelect dropdowns, and pending badge readability. All 14 test scenarios passed.

issues: Pending badge in PartnerSubscriptionsTab uses 'text-blue-700' (not fixed to text-blue-900 like PartnerOrdersTab). Contrast may still be slightly lower but it's acceptable — not a critical issue.

critical_code_review_comments: PartnerSubscriptionsTab STATUS_COLORS uses 'text-blue-700' for pending while PartnerOrdersTab uses 'text-blue-900' — minor inconsistency, not blocking

Some orders in PartnerOrdersTab show empty STATUS badge (P0-2026-0012, P0-2026-0010, P0-2026-0009) — their status values may not match STATUS_COLORS keys. This is pre-existing behavior, not related to current changes.
SearchableSelect plan field in OrderFormModal has no data-testid attribute (unlike Partner select which has data-testid='order-partner-select') — minor testability issue
passed_tests: Admin login works with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
TypeScript compilation passes with exit 0 (npx tsc --noEmit)
Partner Orders tab loads without errors - data-testid='partner-orders-tab' found
Pending badge in PartnerOrdersTab has correct classes: bg-blue-100 text-blue-900 border-blue-300 (7 badges verified)
Partner field in OrderFormModal is SearchableSelect (role=combobox, data-testid='order-partner-select', opens with 'Search partners...' input)
Plan field in OrderFormModal is SearchableSelect (role=combobox, opens with 'Search plans...' input showing: None, Platform Admin, Free Trial, Starter)
Currency field in OrderFormModal is Select dropdown with 17 ISO currencies from constants.ts (GBP, USD, EUR, AUD, CAD...)
Partner Subscriptions tab loads without errors - data-testid='partner-subscriptions-tab' found
Partner field in SubFormModal is SearchableSelect (data-testid='sub-partner-select', role=combobox, search works)
Plan field in SubFormModal is SearchableSelect (opens with 'Search plans...' input)
Plans tab loads without errors - data-testid='plans-tab' found, 3 plans visible (Platform Admin, Free Trial, Starter)
Plans tab uses ISO_CURRENCIES from constants.ts (17 options: GBP, USD, EUR, AUD, CAD verified)
Subscriptions tab (COMMERCE) loads without errors - data-testid='subscriptions-tab' found
Subscriptions tab uses ISO_CURRENCIES from constants.ts (17 options: GBP, USD, EUR, AUD, CAD verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Admin Panel UI/UX improvements from the review request are working correctly. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors. Key changes verified: (1) ISO_CURRENCIES shared constant in frontend/src/lib/constants.ts (17 currencies) imported in all 4 admin files, (2) SearchableSelect (combobox with search) replaces standard Select for Partner and Plan fields in PartnerOrdersTab and PartnerSubscriptionsTab form modals, (3) Currency field in PartnerOrders form is now a Select with ISO currencies (not text input), (4) Pending badge in PartnerOrdersTab has improved readability with bg-blue-100 text-blue-900 border-blue-300. Admin login: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!, partner code: automate-accounts.
